content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.cli_args_policy.v1",
  "max_cmdline_chars_soft": 6000,
  "prefer_file_payload": true,
  "prefer_env_payload": true,
  "notes": "When constructing commands, avoid long inline JSON; write payloads to temp files or pass via env. This reduces Windows CLI length failures."
}
